categories.title: Business categories to search
categories.description: List of business types to search for on Google Maps. Examples: tattoo shop, hair salon, coffee shop.

locations.title: Locations to search
locations.description: Towns or cities to search in. Format: 'City, State'. Example: Portland, Maine.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrent browsers
maxConcurrency.description: How many browser tabs run in parallel. Keep at 3 to avoid blocks.

delayMin.title: Min delay between requests (seconds)
delayMin.description: Minimum random delay between page requests to avoid detection.

delayMax.title: Max delay between requests (seconds)
delayMax.description: Maximum random delay between page requests to avoid detection.
